author: Professor Jason
text: What topics should we cover in the remaining lectures?

author: Alice
text: I'd like more coverage on machine learning applications.

author: Bob
text: I agree with Alice. ML is really important for our field.

author: Carol
text: What about data visualization? That seems equally important.

author: Dan
text: Both are good. Maybe we can do a combined module on ML visualization?

author: Eve
text: Can we get more practice problems for the exam?

author: Frank
text: Yes, please! More examples would really help.

author: Grace
text: The existing problem set is already comprehensive.

author: Henry
text: I think we need more difficult problems to challenge ourselves.
